name: Projectworks
description: Projectworks integration for reading users, clients, projects, modules, tasks, resourcing, timesheets, leave, invoices, and expense claims from your professional services automation account.

consumer_key.label: Consumer Key
consumer_key.help_text: From Projectworks -> Admin -> API Accounts -> create an account -> Details. Used as the Basic auth username.

consumer_secret.label: Consumer Secret
consumer_secret.help_text: Shown only once when the API account is created. Used as the Basic auth password.

list_users.description: List users/employees. Optionally filter by user ID, email, name, external reference, or modified-since date.

user_id.description: Filter by a specific user ID

modified_since_date.description: Only return users modified on or after this ISO 8601 date-time (e.g. 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z)

include_custom_fields.description: Include custom field values in the response

fields.description: Optional list of response field names (PascalCase, e.g. ["UserID", "FirstName", "Email"]) to return for each record. When omitted, full records are returned. Use this to keep large result sets small for an LLM context window, then call the matching get_* action for the full record.

get_user.description: Retrieve a single user/employee by ID.

list_roles.description: List the roles configured in the account. Use the returned userRoleID values for update_user_roles and the role_id of update_task_placeholder.

role_code.description: Filter by a specific role code

fields.description: Optional list of response field names (PascalCase, e.g. ["UserID", "FirstName", "Email"]) to return for each record. When omitted, full records are returned. Use this to keep large result sets small for an LLM context window, then call the matching get_* action for the full record.

roles.description: List of roles (each with userRoleID, code, description)

list_clients.description: List clients/companies. Optionally filter by office, client ID, name, external reference, or modified-since date.

client_id.description: Filter by a specific client ID

modified_since_date.description: Only return clients modified on or after this ISO 8601 date-time

include_custom_fields.description: Include custom field values in the response

fields.description: Optional list of response field names (PascalCase, e.g. ["UserID", "FirstName", "Email"]) to return for each record. When omitted, full records are returned. Use this to keep large result sets small for an LLM context window, then call the matching get_* action for the full record.

get_client.description: Retrieve a single client/company by ID.

list_projects.description: List projects. Optionally filter by client, project ID, user, project number, name, external reference, or modified-since date.

project_id.description: Filter by a specific project ID

user_id.description: Filter by an assigned user ID

modified_since_date.description: Only return projects modified on or after this ISO 8601 date-time

include_custom_fields.description: Include custom field values in the response

fields.description: Optional list of response field names (PascalCase, e.g. ["UserID", "FirstName", "Email"]) to return for each record. When omitted, full records are returned. Use this to keep large result sets small for an LLM context window, then call the matching get_* action for the full record.

get_project.description: Retrieve a single project by ID.

list_modules.description: List modules (sub-divisions of a project). Optionally filter by project, module ID, name, external reference, or modified-since date.

module_id.description: Filter by a specific module ID

modified_since_date.description: Only return modules modified on or after this ISO 8601 date-time

include_custom_fields.description: Include custom field values in the response

fields.description: Optional list of response field names (PascalCase, e.g. ["UserID", "FirstName", "Email"]) to return for each record. When omitted, full records are returned. Use this to keep large result sets small for an LLM context window, then call the matching get_* action for the full record.

get_module.description: Retrieve a single module by ID.

list_tasks.description: List tasks. Optionally filter by project, module, task ID, user, name, external reference, or modified-since date.

task_id.description: Filter by a specific task ID

user_id.description: Filter by an assigned user ID

modified_since_date.description: Only return tasks modified on or after this ISO 8601 date-time

include_custom_fields.description: Include custom field values in the response

fields.description: Optional list of response field names (PascalCase, e.g. ["UserID", "FirstName", "Email"]) to return for each record. When omitted, full records are returned. Use this to keep large result sets small for an LLM context window, then call the matching get_* action for the full record.

get_task.description: Retrieve a single task by ID.

list_resources.description: List resourcing bookings. Optionally filter by project, module, resource type, user, date range, mode, level, or modified-since date.

after_resource_id.description: Return resources with an ID greater than this value (cursor-style incremental pull)

start_date.description: Filter bookings on or after this ISO 8601 date

end_date.description: Filter bookings on or before this ISO 8601 date

modified_since_date.description: Only return resources modified on or after this ISO 8601 date-time

fields.description: Optional list of response field names (PascalCase, e.g. ["UserID", "FirstName", "Email"]) to return for each record. When omitted, full records are returned. Use this to keep large result sets small for an LLM context window, then call the matching get_* action for the full record.

get_resource.description: Retrieve a single resourcing booking by ID.

list_timesheets.description: List timesheet (time entry) records. Optionally filter by ID, user, task, date, comment, external references, or modified-since date.

timesheet_id.description: Filter by a specific timesheet entry ID

date.description: Filter by a specific ISO 8601 date

user_external_reference.description: Filter by the user's external reference

task_external_reference.description: Filter by the task's external reference

modified_since_date.description: Only return timesheets modified on or after this ISO 8601 date-time

include_custom_fields.description: Include custom field values in the response

fields.description: Optional list of response field names (PascalCase, e.g. ["UserID", "FirstName", "Email"]) to return for each record. When omitted, full records are returned. Use this to keep large result sets small for an LLM context window, then call the matching get_* action for the full record.

list_leaves.description: List leave requests. Optionally filter by leave ID, user, type, status, date range, external reference, or modified-since date.

leave_id.description: Filter by a specific leave ID

start_date.description: Filter leave on or after this ISO 8601 date

end_date.description: Filter leave on or before this ISO 8601 date

modified_since_date.description: Only return leave modified on or after this ISO 8601 date-time

fields.description: Optional list of response field names (PascalCase, e.g. ["UserID", "FirstName", "Email"]) to return for each record. When omitted, full records are returned. Use this to keep large result sets small for an LLM context window, then call the matching get_* action for the full record.

get_leave.description: Retrieve a single leave request by ID.

list_leave_types.description: List the leave types configured in the account. Use the returned typeID values when creating or updating leave.

type_id.description: Filter by a specific leave type ID

fields.description: Optional list of response field names (PascalCase, e.g. ["UserID", "FirstName", "Email"]) to return for each record. When omitted, full records are returned. Use this to keep large result sets small for an LLM context window, then call the matching get_* action for the full record.

leave_types.description: List of leave types (each with typeID, name, code, isActive, isPaid)

list_invoices.description: List invoices. Optionally filter by invoice ID/number, client, project, billing contact, status, date range, or modified-since date.

invoice_id.description: Filter by a specific invoice ID

start_date.description: Filter invoices on or after this ISO 8601 date

end_date.description: Filter invoices on or before this ISO 8601 date

modified_since_date.description: Only return invoices modified on or after this ISO 8601 date-time

fields.description: Optional list of response field names (PascalCase, e.g. ["UserID", "FirstName", "Email"]) to return for each record. When omitted, full records are returned. Use this to keep large result sets small for an LLM context window, then call the matching get_* action for the full record.

get_invoice.description: Retrieve a single invoice by ID.

list_expense_claims.description: List expense claims. Optionally filter by user, client, project, module, type, status, billable/reimbursable flags, date range, invoice, or modified-since date.

after_expense_claim_id.description: Return expense claims with an ID greater than this value (cursor-style incremental pull)

expense_claim_type_id.description: Filter by expense claim type ID

expense_claim_status_id.description: Filter by expense claim status ID

start_date.description: Filter claims on or after this ISO 8601 date

end_date.description: Filter claims on or before this ISO 8601 date

modified_since_date.description: Only return expense claims modified on or after this ISO 8601 date-time

include_custom_fields.description: Include custom field values in the response

fields.description: Optional list of response field names (PascalCase, e.g. ["UserID", "FirstName", "Email"]) to return for each record. When omitted, full records are returned. Use this to keep large result sets small for an LLM context window, then call the matching get_* action for the full record.

get_expense_claim.description: Retrieve a single expense claim by ID.

include_custom_fields.description: Include custom field values in the response

list_offices.description: List offices. Optionally filter by office ID, name, external reference, or modified-since date.

office_id.description: Filter by a specific office ID

modified_since_date.description: Only return offices modified on or after this ISO 8601 date-time

fields.description: Optional list of response field names (PascalCase, e.g. ["UserID", "FirstName", "Email"]) to return for each record. When omitted, full records are returned. Use this to keep large result sets small for an LLM context window, then call the matching get_* action for the full record.

search_users.description: Free-text search for users by name or email. Scans one page (default 200 records) and returns up to `limit` lean matches. A convenience layer over list_users for "find the user called ..." flows; for exhaustive enumeration use list_users with explicit filters and pagination.

query.description: Case-insensitive substring matched against the user's name or email

limit.description: Maximum number of matches to return (default 10)

fields.description: Optional list of response field names (PascalCase, e.g. ["UserID", "FirstName", "Email"]) to return for each record. When omitted, full records are returned. Use this to keep large result sets small for an LLM context window, then call the matching get_* action for the full record.

page.description: Page to scan (default 1). Increase to scan further into large data sets.

page_size.description: Number of records to scan in one page (default 200)

search_clients.description: Free-text search for clients by name. Scans one page (default 200 records) and returns up to `limit` lean matches. A convenience layer over list_clients for "find the client called ..." flows; for exhaustive enumeration use list_clients with explicit filters and pagination.

query.description: Case-insensitive substring matched against the client's name

limit.description: Maximum number of matches to return (default 10)

fields.description: Optional list of response field names (PascalCase, e.g. ["UserID", "FirstName", "Email"]) to return for each record. When omitted, full records are returned. Use this to keep large result sets small for an LLM context window, then call the matching get_* action for the full record.

page.description: Page to scan (default 1). Increase to scan further into large data sets.

page_size.description: Number of records to scan in one page (default 200)

search_projects.description: Free-text search for projects by name or project number. Scans one page (default 200 records) and returns up to `limit` lean matches. A convenience layer over list_projects for "find the project called ..." flows; for exhaustive enumeration use list_projects with explicit filters and pagination.

query.description: Case-insensitive substring matched against the project's name or project number

limit.description: Maximum number of matches to return (default 10)

fields.description: Optional list of response field names (PascalCase, e.g. ["UserID", "FirstName", "Email"]) to return for each record. When omitted, full records are returned. Use this to keep large result sets small for an LLM context window, then call the matching get_* action for the full record.

page.description: Page to scan (default 1). Increase to scan further into large data sets.

page_size.description: Number of records to scan in one page (default 200)

update_client.description: Update an existing client. Only the provided fields are changed (partial update).

update_project.description: Update an existing project. Only the provided fields are changed (partial update).

create_module.description: Create a new module within a project.

is_services.description: Whether the module is a services module

update_module.description: Update an existing module. Only the provided fields are changed (partial update).

is_services.description: Whether the module is a services module

create_task.description: Create a new task within a module.

is_on_timesheet.description: Whether the task appears on timesheets

use_default_rate.description: Whether to use the default rate

update_task.description: Update an existing task. Only the provided fields are changed (partial update).

is_on_timesheet.description: Whether the task appears on timesheets

use_default_rate.description: Whether to use the default rate

update_user.description: Update an existing user. Only the provided fields are changed (partial update).

days.description: Leave days, each an object with date (ISO 8601), typeID (integer), and hours (number)

update_leave.description: Replace an existing leave request. All required fields must be supplied (full replacement).

days.description: Leave days, each an object with date (ISO 8601), typeID (integer), and hours (number)

delete_leave.description: Delete a leave request by ID.

is_processed.description: Whether the claim has been processed

file.description: Receipt/invoice file to attach. Projectworks usually requires at least one file when creating an expense claim. Supply the file as base64 'content'.

contentType.description: MIME type of the file, e.g. 'application/pdf'

update_expense_claim.description: Replace an existing expense claim. All required fields must be supplied (full replacement).

is_processed.description: Whether the claim has been processed

file.description: Receipt/invoice file to attach. Supply the file as base64 'content'.

contentType.description: MIME type of the file, e.g. 'application/pdf'

delete_expense_claim.description: Delete an expense claim by ID.

is_reviewed.description: Whether the entry has been reviewed

update_timesheet.description: Replace an existing timesheet entry by ID.

is_reviewed.description: Whether the entry has been reviewed

delete_timesheet.description: Delete a timesheet entry by ID.

update_project_user.description: Set or update a user's rate card / rate on a project.

update_task_user.description: Create or replace a user's assignment on a task (hours, rate, active/pinned).

update_task_placeholder.description: Create or replace a placeholder (unassigned role) allocation on a task.

placeholder_id.description: Placeholder ID (omit to create a new one)

role_id.description: Role ID for the placeholder (required; get valid IDs from list_roles)

update_user_roles.description: Replace the set of role IDs assigned to a user.

user_role_ids.description: Full set of role IDs the user should have
The full set of role IDs now assigned to the user

update_user_leave_balances.description: Replace a user's leave balances. Each balance is an object with leaveTypeID, balance, and unit.

balances.description: The leave balances now set on the user

update_user_postings.description: Create a user posting (employment posting: office, team, position, rate, capacity).

set_custom_fields.description: Create or update custom field data on a client, project, module, task, or user.

entity_type.description: Which entity the fields belong to

fieldID.description: Custom field ID (from list_custom_fields / your config)
